children.text: conduct research on electric and gas utility regulatory policy issues,
develop data processing and retrieval methods for electric and gas utility ratemaking, and
perform other functions directly related to assisting State regulatory authorities in carrying out their functions under State law and this Act.
80 percent for the fiscal year 1979; and
all information gathered by the institute is available to the Secretary, the Commission, and the public, and

no portion of any such grant is used to support or oppose any legislative proposal except by means of testimony by representatives of the institute provided by invitation to a committee of Congress or of a State legislature.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: d Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated not more than $2,000,000 for each of the fiscal years 1979 and 1980 for purposes of making grants under this section. No amounts may be appropriated for any fiscal year after the fiscal year 1980 to carry out the purposes of this section without a specific authorization of Congress.
